name: review-depth-infra
author: diffscope
description: Infrastructure and configuration security benchmark pack for deeper live review runs.

fixtures.name: docker-user-root
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/Dockerfile b/Dockerfile
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/Dockerfile
+++ b/Dockerfile
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 FROM node:20-alpine
 RUN adduser -D appuser
 WORKDIR /app
-USER appuser
+USER root
 CMD ["node", "server.js"]

expected_findings.description: Container is explicitly configured to run as root instead of a non-root user.
contains_any: should run as a non-root user

fixtures.description: Containers should not be switched back to root for runtime execution.

fixtures.name: terraform-ssh-open-world
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/main.tf b/main.tf
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/main.tf
+++ b/main.tf
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ resource "aws_security_group" "ssh" {
   name        = "public-ssh"
   from_port   = 22
   to_port     = 22
   protocol    = "tcp"
-  cidr_blocks = ["10.0.0.0/8"]
+  cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
 }

expected_findings.description: Security group opens SSH to the entire internet.

fixtures.description: Infrastructure changes should not expose SSH to the public internet.

fixtures.name: github-actions-event-script-injection
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/triage.yml b/.github/workflows/triage.yml
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/triage.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/triage.yml
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 name: Issue Triage
 on: issues
 jobs:
   label:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps: []
+    steps:
+      - run: echo "${{ github.event.issue.title }}" | bash

expected_findings.description: Attacker-controlled GitHub event data is executed by a shell step.

fixtures.description: CI automation should never pipe untrusted GitHub event fields into a shell.

fixtures.name: k8s-privileged-container
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/deploy/pod.yaml b/deploy/pod.yaml
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/deploy/pod.yaml
+++ b/deploy/pod.yaml
@@ -5,6 +5,6 @@ spec:
   containers:
     - name: api
       image: example/api:latest
       securityContext:
-        privileged: false
+        privileged: true
       ports:
         - containerPort: 8080
fixtures.description: Kubernetes workloads should avoid privileged mode unless absolutely required.
